description_long: This object is a shotgun with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a dark wooden full stock and a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a prominent front sight and a tubular magazine running beneath it. The receiver area includes a visible trigger and a rounded trigger guard, with mechanical details such as a loading port and action release lever apparent on the side. The stock is solid and ergonomically shaped, providing a stable shoulder rest, while the fore-end is simple and unadorned. The overall finish is subdued, with minimal gloss and a slightly worn appearance, suggesting practical use. The shotgun's construction appears sturdy, with all major components integrated for durability and reliability.
description: A sturdy, dark-finished shotgun with a full wooden stock, short matte black barrel, and a rounded trigger guard. The design is utilitarian and robust, with visible mechanical details and a practical, worn finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, metal receiver, and short barrel with a tubular magazine beneath.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the barrel's muzzle, front sight, and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same major features as view 0, with clearer visibility of the action mechanism and loading port.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver, with the trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no ribbing or venting visible; short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves or reinforcement
